# Lenilson Pinheiro Valério — Portfolio (llms.txt)
# Human-readable index for AI assistants and crawlers.
# Production URL: https://lenilsonpinheiro.github.io/portfolio2026/

> Lenilson Pinheiro Valério is a Senior Project Manager and digital transformation leader (~25 years per 2026.1 résumé): Citibank (Qintess), TCS/Petrobras, Banco do Nordeste (Sonda IT), SUNAT/NTConsult (Peru). PhD candidate in Applied IT (UNIFOR). PMP · PSM I. Open Finance, AI/ML for fraud, SAP, OutSystems, Salesforce, Power BI, Hadoop/Spark, AWS/Azure/GCP. Phone: +55 85 99733-1000 | Email: lenilsonpinheiro@gmail.com | LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lenilsonpinheiro/

- /portfolio2026/privacy.html — Privacy policy (contact form, Apps Script, LGPD/GDPR)
- /portfolio2026/terms.html — Terms of service (site + contact form)
- /portfolio2026/robots.txt — Crawler policy
- /portfolio2026/llms.txt — This file

## Sections (in-page anchors)
- #home — Hero, headline, CTAs
- #about — Summary, KPI stats (25 yrs, +15% fraud-model uplift, PMP/PSM, Citibank tenure)
- #experience — Four résumé-aligned blocks (TCS/Petrobras; Citibank; NTConsult/Sonda/prior; education & certs)
- #tech — Skills grid (management, data, cloud, enterprise dev)
- #projects — Open Finance, AI/fraud, Petrobras highlights (links to LinkedIn for corroboration)
- #contact — Email, phone, LinkedIn, GitHub + contact form (POST → Google Apps Script Web App / MailApp)

## Languages
- Default: en-US
- Optional: pt-BR, es-ES via UI or ?lang=

- Person + WebSite + ProfilePage in index.html (name, jobTitle, address Fortaleza/CE/BR).
